case_title: VLADISLAV PEREVERZEV VS. ARCHIMEDES BANYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-31-2017 CONTINUED TO JUL-12-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREVERZEV, VLADISLAV AS TO DEFENDANT BANYA, ARCHIMEDES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-31-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-03-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-08-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-22-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-12-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
